# generuss design

> Custom websites and search/AI visibility optimization by Russ (generuss design). Hand-built, conversion-focused sites for service businesses and founders, hosted free on Cloudflare, live in 21 days. Plus an audit-first optimization service covering SEO, AEO, GEO, local, voice, performance, CRO, email deliverability, and social surfaces.

Contact: russ@generuss.com

## Key pages

- [Home](https://generussdesign.com/): Custom websites that convert. Offer, portfolio, guarantees, and booking.
- [SEO, AEO + GEO services](https://generussdesign.com/seo): Search + AI visibility optimization. Nine surfaces audited, scored, and fixed.
- [Website Taste Audit](https://generussdesign.com/taste-audit): 18 pass-or-fail design and conversion checks, $197 flat, delivered in 48 hours.
- [Blog](https://generussdesign.com/blog): Build logs and essays on design, AI-assisted development, and sales strategy.
- [Connect](https://generussdesign.com/connect): Booking, socials, and current projects.
- [OGC vendor sites](https://generussdesign.com/ogc): Custom websites for Oregon Ghost Conference vendors and speakers, from $500.

## Facts

- Business: generuss design (Generuss LLC)
- What it does: custom website design and development; search and AI visibility optimization
- Offers: The Launch Page (one-page site, $500 flat, live in 7 days, credits toward the Flagship) · The Conversion-Engineered Site (full custom build, from $4,500, live in 21 days) · The Growth Engine (monthly SEO/AEO/GEO optimization, from $750/month)
- Stack: hand-coded sites (no page builders), typically Astro + Cloudflare
- Guarantees: live in 21 days or you don't pay the balance (Flagship; Launch Page is 7 days), love the first design or your deposit back, client owns code/domain/content with free hosting (leave anytime, take everything)
